subject: Dreepy, a small ghost-dragon Pokemon with a large round head, teal-green coloring, small fins, and a long tapered tail, drifting above ocean waves
description: A small teal-green ghost-type creature floats just above a choppy sea, its round oversized head and long trailing tail giving it a spectral drift quality. The body has a smooth rounded form with small wing-like fins at its sides. The ocean surface below shows white-capped waves, and the background is a pale purple-grey sky suggesting an overcast or twilight coastal setting. The overall composition is calm and melancholic, evoking a spirit wandering familiar prehistoric waters.
background: choppy ocean surface, pale overcast sky
